# 📚 Prayaas Book Bank

<p align="center">
  <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="120" alt="Prayaas Logo"/>
</p>

<h3 align="center">A full-featured Android book bank system for colleges</h3>
<p align="center">
  Built with <strong>Kotlin · Jetpack Compose · Firebase · ML Kit QR Scanning</strong>
</p>

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Android-3DDC84?style=flat&logo=android&logoColor=white"/>
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Kotlin-1.9.20-7F52FF?style=flat&logo=kotlin&logoColor=white"/>

  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Firebase-Firestore_%2B_Functions-FFCA28?style=flat&logo=firebase&logoColor=black"/>
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Min_SDK-24_(Android_7.0)-green?style=flat"/>
</p>

---

## Quick Overview

| | Student | Admin |
|---|---|---|
| **Entry** | Browse catalogue, search books | View all orders, filter by status |
| **Core action** | Add to cart → checkout | Scan QR → issue / receive return |
| **Email** | Confirmation sent on order | — |
| **QR** | See QR info on each book | Scan to verify copy identity |
| **Availability** | Live stock count per book | Inventory with progress bars |
| **Offline** | 10 sample books preloaded | 4 demo orders preloaded |

---

## Features

### Student Flow
- **Role selection** — Student or Admin entry point
- **Book catalogue** — Browse all books with real-time availability, search by title / author / subject
- **Book detail** — Cover image, author, summary, ISBN, edition, QR info, availability
- **Cart** — Add / remove books; tap any item to jump back to its detail view
- **Checkout** — Name, College ID, mobile, email with inline validation
- **Email confirmation** — Auto-sent on order via Firebase Functions + Nodemailer
- **Order success** — Order ID, books list, pickup instructions card

### Admin Flow
- **Orders dashboard** — Stats: total / pending / issued / returned; filter tabs
- **Issue books** — Tap _Issue_ → scan book QR → confirm → Firestore updated
- **Return books** — Tap _Return_ → scan QR → verify same copy was issued → DB updated
- **Inventory** — All books with colour-coded availability progress bars
- **QR Generator** — Generate and share printable QR code images for each physical copy

### QR System
- Every physical copy gets a **unique QR** encoding `{copyId, bookId, title, author}` as JSON
- **ML Kit Barcode Scanning** (on-device, no internet needed)
- Issue flow **validates** that the scanned QR belongs to the ordered book
- Return flow **validates** the returned copy matches the one originally issued to that student
- `QrCodeGenerator.kt` produces printable `Bitmap` outputs via ZXing

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|---|---|
| Language | Kotlin 1.9 |
| UI | Jetpack Compose + Material 3 |
| Navigation | Navigation Compose |
| State | ViewModel + StateFlow |
| Database | Firebase Firestore (real-time listeners) |
| Email | Firebase Cloud Functions + Nodemailer (Gmail SMTP) |
| QR Scanning | ML Kit Barcode Scanning + CameraX |
| QR Generation | ZXing `QRCodeWriter` |
| Image Loading | Coil |
| Offline/Demo | `LocalDataSource.kt` — 10 books + 4 orders, no Firebase needed |

---

## Project Structure

```
PrayaasBookBank/
├── app/src/main/java/com/prayaas/bookbank/
│   ├── MainActivity.kt                   ← NavHost, app entry point
│   ├── ui/
│   │   ├── Navigation.kt                 ← 10 screen routes
│   │   ├── theme/Theme.kt                ← Brand colors, typography, shapes
│   │   ├── components/Components.kt      ← Shared composables
│   │   └── screens/
│   │       ├── RoleSelectScreen.kt
│   │       ├── CatalogueScreen.kt
│   │       ├── BookDetailScreen.kt
│   │       ├── CartScreen.kt
│   │       ├── CheckoutScreen.kt         ← + OrderSuccessScreen
│   │       ├── AdminOrdersScreen.kt
│   │       ├── AdminInventoryScreen.kt
│   │       ├── QrScannerScreen.kt        ← CameraX + ML Kit
│   │       └── QrGeneratorScreen.kt      ← ZXing bitmap grid
│   ├── data/
│   │   ├── model/Models.kt               ← Book, Order, BookCopy, QrPayload
│   │   └── repository/
│   │       ├── BookRepository.kt         ← All Firestore operations
│   │       └── LocalDataSource.kt        ← Offline sample data
│   ├── viewmodel/ViewModels.kt           ← 4 ViewModels with offline fallback
│   └── utils/
│       ├── QrCodeGenerator.kt
│       └── EmailHelper.kt
├── firebase-functions/
│   ├── index.js                          ← sendEmail, onOrderCreated trigger
│   └── package.json
├── seed/seed.js                          ← One-time Firestore population script
├── firestore.rules                       ← Security rules
├── firestore.indexes.json
└── screenshots/                          ← Dark-mode SVG mockups
```

---

## Firestore Data Model

### `books/` collection
```json
{
  "id": "auto",
  "title": "Data Structures and Algorithms",
  "author": "Thomas H. Cormen",
  "isbn": "978-0262033848",
  "subject": "Computer Science",
  "summary": "...",
  "totalCopies": 6,
  "availableCopies": 4,
  "edition": "4th Edition",
  "pages": 1292,
  "publisher": "MIT Press"
}
```

### `bookCopies/` collection
```json
{
  "bookId": "abc123",
  "qrData": "DSA-ABC1-001",
  "isAvailable": true,
  "currentOrderId": null
}
```

### `orders/` collection
```json
{
  "orderId": "auto",
  "studentName": "Rahul Sharma",
  "studentId": "2021CS001",
  "mobileNumber": "9876543210",
  "email": "rahul@college.edu",
  "status": "PENDING",
  "books": [
    {
      "bookId": "abc123",
      "bookTitle": "Data Structures and Algorithms",
      "copyId": null,
      "isReturned": false,
      "issuedAt": null
    }
  ]
}
```

### Order Status Flow

```
PENDING → PARTIAL (some books scanned) → ISSUED (all books issued)
                                                  ↓
                                           RETURNED (all returned)
```

---

## Setup

### 1. Firebase Project

```bash
# Create a project at https://console.firebase.google.com
# Add Android app with package: com.prayaas.bookbank
# Download google-services.json → place in app/google-services.json
# Enable: Firestore, Authentication, Storage, Functions (Blaze plan)
```

### 2. Deploy Firestore Rules & Indexes

```bash
firebase deploy --only firestore:rules,firestore:indexes
```

### 3. Seed Sample Data

```bash
cd seed
npm install firebase-admin
# Save Firebase service account key as seed/serviceAccountKey.json
node seed.js
```

### 4. Deploy Cloud Functions (Email)

```bash
cd firebase-functions
npm install
firebase deploy --only functions

# Set email credentials
firebase functions:secrets:set GMAIL_USER   # your Gmail address
firebase functions:secrets:set GMAIL_PASS   # Gmail App Password
```

### 5. Open in Android Studio

```
File → Open → select PrayaasBookBank/
```

Gradle syncs automatically. The app launches immediately with **10 sample books and 4 demo orders** — no Firebase needed to explore the UI.

> **First launch note:** To seed live data, uncomment the `catalogueViewModel.seedData()` line in `MainActivity.kt`, run once, then re-comment it.

---

## QR Code Printing

Generate QR code bitmaps for each physical book copy from within the app:

**Admin → Inventory → QR Code Generator (⬛ icon)**

Or programmatically:

```kotlin
val bitmap = QrCodeGenerator.generateQrBitmap(
    copyId = "DSA-ABC1-001",
    bookId = "firestore_doc_id",
    title  = "Data Structures and Algorithms",
    author = "Thomas H. Cormen"
)
// Bitmap encodes: {"copyId":"DSA-ABC1-001","bookId":"...","title":"...","author":"..."}
```
